case_title: HOWE, GREGORY VS BANH, MONG LONG et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOWE, GREGORY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANH, MONG LONG $1,175.00 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,223.00, JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF DANIEL CHIN AND PRUDENTIAL CALIFORNIA REALTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEF'S CORRESPONDENCE FILED; MAILED OUT FORM FOR MOTION FOR TIMEPAYMENT;
CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFENDANT FILED; RETURNED $1223.00 CHECK WITH FORM SC-145 AND INFO;

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY HOWE, GREGORY AS TO DEFENDANT BANH, MONG LONG CHIN, DANIEL PRUDENTIAL CALIFORNIA REALTY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-29-1999 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
